evals.name: blog-intro
evals.prompt: Write a 150-word intro for a blog post about switching our team from Jira to Linear.
evals.expected_output: Concrete, varied-rhythm prose with low plainly density; no boosters, antithesis tics, or formulaic openers.

evals.name: readme-why
evals.prompt: Write the 'Why this exists' section of a README for an open-source rate-limiter library.
evals.expected_output: Plain, concrete docs prose; low plainly density; no copula-avoidance or vague abstraction.

evals.name: marketing-seriesa
evals.prompt: Write a 120-word LinkedIn post announcing our company's Series A funding round.
evals.expected_output: Human-sounding announcement; low plainly density despite the marketing register most prone to slop.
